description: Two structurally-independent algorithms agree on the cuspidal eigenvalues a_q: (A) geometric Brandt enumeration in the icosian order (frontier-run/out/a_q_extended.json, 664 ideals to norm 4999); (B) point-counting the curve 31.1-a1/Q(sqrt5) over residue fields. Agreement at all shared prime ideals certifies the modularity identification used to assemble the L-function.
